title: Grammar Structures from the Text
instructions: Complete each sentence with 2–5 words exactly as they appear in the article.

questions.sentence: Once regarded as a mere inconvenience of getting older, hearing loss ______ as a major public health issue.
Earwax build-up and infections are the usual causes of conductive hearing loss and ______ relatively easily.
Sensorineural hearing loss is the most common type and ______ damage to the inner ear.
Oxidative stress and inflammation ______ in the connection between hearing loss and cardiovascular disease.
The Lancet commission concluded that some cases of dementia are caused by hearing loss and ______.
Foods rich in antioxidants, folate and omega-3 fatty acids ______ protective of the inner ear.
According to Golub, new therapies for hearing loss ______ recently.
answer: have gotten a bit of a buzz

questions.sentence: The phase III trial results look promising, but they ______.
questions.explanation: Formal C1/C2 structure meaning 'have not been published yet'.

questions.sentence: The delivery system developed in Australia ______ for standalone gene therapy in the future.
Researchers hope gene therapies can be delivered to the correct part of the inner ear and ______.
